flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Highland Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $4.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Highland Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Highland Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Highland Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (33.3% → 29.5%).
